productDisplayName: Quechua Unisex Forclaz Air Black Backpack
description: Be it sun, rain, storm, grab your Forclaz 25 Air backpack from quechua and hit the tracks. Designed for the day hiker, this is perfect for those short weekend getaways. What makes this bag stand apart is its Air Cooling technology that allows the bag to sit comfortably on your torso, offering ample ventilation to your body.Capacity: 22 litresWeight: 1,050 gWarranty: 5 years Made of 100% polyester on the outer, with a nylon lining for durability and comfort Padded with 60% polyurethane and 40% EVA for enhanced comfort and durability Zippered main compartment with one inner zipped pocket and one outer zipped pockets to stash away essentials Two zipped pockets on the wasit belt to hold quick essentials Pole holder to evenly distribute weight and enhance bag life Compression strap to ensure proper support to material inside the bag Load adjustable padded straps and a chest strap to protect the shoulders and back from injuries by evenly distributing weight Ventilated back with Air Cooling properties to offer ample ventilation to the skin and wicking away sweat CareStore backpack in a dry placeDo not machine wash, tumble dry, dry clean, bleach or ironHand wash using luke warm soapy waterUse waterproofing spray after a few years to renew water-repellant property of the fabric
